title: desmodium humile
intro: Desmodium humile, also known as low calabar bean or low ironweed, is a plant species native to the Americas. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a purgative and emetic, due to the presence of rotenone, a toxic compound that can cause vomiting and diarrhea. The health benefits of Desmodium humile include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, although it should be used with caution and under medical supervision. Desmodium humile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or poultices, but its toxicity requires careful handling and dosing.
